decision.reason: batch_execution.throughput_claim_eligible=false; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; profiler command --batch-sample-mode must match retained sampler mode; profiler command must include --batch-sample-eq-ok; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-artifact must match retained sampler equality artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-rows must match retained sampler equality rows; profiler command must start with rocprofv3; profiler command device env prefix must match retained command; profiler command --profiler-json must match profiler.artifact_path; profiler command --json must match retained artifact path; profiler command --c1-baseline-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --serial-bridge-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --primitive-correctness-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-mode must match retained sampler mode; profiler command must include --batch-sample-eq-ok; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-artifact must match retained sampler equality artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-rows must match retained sampler equality rows; execution.batch_execution.blockers must be empty; execution.batch_execution.row_execution must not contain serial or fallback; execution.batch_execution.native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[3].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[3].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[7].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[7].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[11].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[11].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[15].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[15].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[19].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[19].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[23].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[23].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[35].native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions[35].full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.layer_executions native full-attention count must match native_full_attention_layers; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.blockers must be empty

notes: Native retained c>N path uses packed prompt slabs and step_batch_native for decode.
Batch split-K decode remains out of scope; this accepted protocol keeps context < 1024.
